purpose: Low-token discovery index for released public Trigon records.
scan_rules: Preserve each record's exact status and claim ceiling.
Do not promote exploratory, failed, null, ambiguous, blocked, or superseded work.
Check related records, source IDs, datasets, controls, failures, and version links before proposing a new test.
Do not infer private, unpublished, or missing information.
Classify proposed work as reuse, reproduction, replication, extension, repair, or genuinely new only after the archive scan.
